creator: dcialdella@gmail.com
text:
Install using a DVD ISO, in a HP Elitebook 7560P.
All was perfect, but never boot.
I check the disks and all looks right.

I try to boot from MEMSTICK but never boot in the same Notebook.

I can do a workaround.

I think something is wrong in the boot partition and this avoid a normal boot in the notebook.

I could test or try anything.
